product_overview: AuroraLens provides hyper-local Aurora Borealis probability forecasts by combining live space telemetry, atmospheric data, and spatial ML models, presented on an interactive 3D globe with tailored viewing recommendations.
core_goals: Deliver accurate, hyper-local aurora probability scores using live DSCOVR telemetry and spatial XGBoost models.
Present real-time and historical telemetry and forecasts through an interactive 3D map for exploration and decision-making.
Recommend prime viewing spots near the user by combining elevation, cloud cover, and forecast offsets.
Allow users to scrub time (past and short-term future) to compare forecasts against historical solar data.
Operate reliably and transparently with clear error handling when upstream data (NOAA/NASA/weather) is unavailable.

features.name: Global Forecast
features.description: Fetch global aurora probability forecasts from spatial ML models using live solar wind inputs to compute a localized aurora probability percentage.
user_flows: GET /api/forecast/global?lat={lat}&lon={lon}&time=now -> Receive 200 with {probability, model_stage, timestamp} (happy path)
GET /api/forecast/global?lat={lat}&lon={lon}&time=now -> Receive 502 when ML inference service or model artifact is unavailable (error path)
GET /api/forecast/global?lat=1000&lon=2000 -> Receive 400 with validation error for invalid coordinates (error path)

features.name: Map Visualization (Interactive 3D Globe)
features.description: Render an interactive 3D globe and overlay forecast heatmaps and localized pins so users can explore aurora probability geographically.
user_flows: GET /api/map/tiles/{z}/{x}/{y} with valid API key header -> Receive 200 with vector tile (pbf) for MapLibre rendering (happy path)
GET /api/forecast/overlay?bbox={minLon,minLat,maxLon,maxLat}&time=now -> Receive 200 with GeoJSON overlay containing localized probability polygons (happy path)
GET /api/map/tiles/{z}/{x}/{y} without API key header -> Receive 401 Unauthorized (error path)
GET /api/forecast/overlay?bbox={...}&time=now -> Receive 503 when overlay generation fails due to upstream forecast service outage (error path)

features.name: Prime Viewing Spots (Sightseeing Scouter)
features.description: Generate top viewing locations relative to a user location by ranking altitude, cloud cover, light pollution and spatial offset from predicted auroral oval.
user_flows: POST /api/viewings/prime with {lat, lon, radius_km, preferences} -> Receive 200 with array of top 3 spots (lat,lon,elevation,cloud_prob,score) (happy path)
POST /api/viewings/prime with a returned spot -> GET /api/weather/forecast?lat={spot.lat}&lon={spot.lon}&hours=6 -> Receive 200 with short-term cloud cover for the spot (happy path follow-up)
POST /api/viewings/prime with invalid payload (missing lat) -> Receive 422 validation error (error path)
POST /api/viewings/prime -> Receive 502 when external weather/elevation API fails to respond (error path)

features.name: Interactive Telemetry
features.description: Expose live solar wind and magnetic telemetry (Bz, Bt, Speed, Density) with precise DSCOVR UTC timestamps for live monitoring and model inputs.
user_flows: GET /api/telemetry/latest -> Receive 200 with {Bz, Bt, Speed, Density, utc_timestamp, source:'DSCOVR'} (happy path)
GET /api/telemetry/dscovr/raw?timestamp={utc} -> Receive 200 with raw DSCOVR packet for that timestamp (happy path follow-up)
GET /api/telemetry/latest -> Receive 504 Gateway Timeout if NOAA DSCOVR upstream times out (error path)
GET /api/telemetry/latest with stale-cache-header=false -> Receive 206 Partial Content when only cached/partial telemetry is available (degraded-data path)

features.name: Temporal Scrubber (Historical & Projection)
features.description: Allow users to move backward and forward in time to view historical forecasts and short-term projections tied to archived telemetry and model replays.
user_flows: GET /api/forecast/historical?lat={lat}&lon={lon}&time={ISO8601} -> Receive 200 with archived forecast, input telemetry, and model_stage (happy path)
GET /api/forecast/projection?lat={lat}&lon={lon}&start={ISO8601}&end={ISO8601} -> Receive 200 with time-series probabilities for requested window (happy path)
GET /api/forecast/historical?time={ISO8601_older_than_retention} -> Receive 404 Not Found when archived data is out of retention range (error path)
GET /api/forecast/projection?start={t2}&end={t1} where end < start -> Receive 400 validation error (error path)

features.description: Fetches global aurora probability forecasts from spatial ML models based on live solar wind data.
interactive 3D globe visualization utilizing Mapbox/Maplibre showing localized aurora forecasts and telemetry.
Dynamically generates precise high-altitude, low-cloud viewing spots using external weather elevations APIs.
Live display of real-time solar magnetic inputs (Bz, Bt, Speed, Density) and exact DSCOVR UTC timestamps.
Allows users to look backward or forward in time to project forecasts against historical solar data.
